abstract:
Workflow orchestration agents in Copilot Studio for public finance budgeting. The video demonstrates how AI-powered agents can:
  • Analyze approved historical data sources to summarize key performance indicators
  • Highlight patterns in funds utilization and surface audit findings
  • Flag reporting lags across budget cycles
  • Compare and evaluate budget scenarios against goals like ROI, equity, and strategic alignment
  • Help budget officers draft decision communications for declined or deferred requests
  • Route drafts for human review and auto-send to stakeholders with budget office copied for transparency

title: Cosmos DB Optimization
abstract:
A deep dive into Azure Cosmos DB optimization strategies covering service options, Request Units (RUs) provisioning models, and data modeling best practices. The video explains manual vs. autoscale throughput, account throughput limits, partition key selection for high cardinality, document size optimization, global secondary indexes, and strategies for storage-heavy and write-heavy workloads.

title: 5 Entra ID Updates You Cannot Afford to Ignore in 2026 (Backup, Governance & Risk Score Exposed)
abstract:
An Entra.Chat episode covering the most impactful new features in Microsoft Entra. MVPs Nathan, Ru, and Thomas join Merill to review recent updates across identity security and governance.

  • Entra Backup and Recovery (preview) â€” protects against accidental configuration changes and soft deletions, with difference reports to track what changed
  • Tenant Governance â€” major updates for managing multi-tenant organizations, including cross-tenant synchronization and lifecycle policies
  • Conditional Access Optimization Agent â€” AI-assisted analysis of Conditional Access policies to identify gaps and redundancies
  • The Great Passkey Debate â€” comparison of device-bound vs synced passkeys, trade-offs in security and usability
  • Retirements â€” SP-less authentication and Azure ACS for SharePoint being deprecated
  • Unified Risk Score in Microsoft Defender â€” consolidated risk view across identity signals
